title: WriteOutput
description: NDJSON output for write, delete, move, copy, and hash operations.

backup_path.description: Backup file path, if a backup was created.

checksum_before.description: BLAKE3 checksum before writing, if the file existed.

mtime_preserved.description: Whether the original mtime was preserved (--preserve-timestamps).

path.description: Absolute path of the target file.

risk_assessment.description:
GAP-2026-011 L6: risk telemetry for size-delta warnings. Omitted
when the write is below the configured risk threshold (default
50% delta) and no other guard was triggered.

stdin_bytes_read.description:
Number of bytes read from stdin (G120 L4 telemetry). 0 means the
caller passed empty stdin and explicitly opted in via
`--allow-empty-stdin`.

wal_policy.description:
G119 L1: sidecar creation policy in effect for this write.
"auto" (default heuristic), "always" (legacy), or "never"
(suppressed).

PlatformInfo.description: Platform-specific fsync method names for diagnostics.

backup_method.description: Backup method when a backup was created: reflink_or_copy or copy (v0.1.30; never hardlink of the live file).

durability.description: Durability mode resolved for this write (v0.1.29 P2-1).

WriteRiskAssessment.description:
GAP-2026-011 L1/L6: Telemetry describing why a write was classified
as risky. Emitted in `WriteOutput.risk_assessment` when the size
delta exceeds the user-configured `--risk-threshold` (default 50%).

guard_triggered.description: Which guard triggered the assessment (always "size" for L1).

new_bytes.description: New file size after the write.
